2026-05-25T10:00:00.CONTENT_EN: The Transport Department announces that the traffic on Sai Kung Man Yee Road leading to High Island Reservoir East Dam is anticipated to be quite busy in general. The operator of Green Minibus Route No. 9A will strengthen its service to cater for passenger demand as necessary. Members of the public are advised to plan ahead their journeys, reserve sufficient commuting time, and be patient while queuing.
2026-05-25T10:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署表示，通往萬宜水庫東壩的西貢萬宜路交通預計一般比較繁忙，專線小巴第9A號線的營辦商會按需要加強服務應付乘客需求。請遊人妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間，同時在輪候時保持忍讓。

2026-05-25T11:07:00.CONTENT_EN: Hong Kong West Kowloon Station Public Car Park is now full. Please use public transport to reach the station.
2026-05-25T11:07:00.CONTENT_CN: 香港西九龍站公眾停車場現已泊滿。請使用公共交通工具前往。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: The vehicle clearance plaza (Hong Kong bound) of the HZMB Zhuhai Port busy
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 港珠澳大橋珠海口岸(往香港方向)的車輛通關廣場繁忙

2026-05-25T16:16:00.CONTENT_EN: The vehicle clearance plaza (Hong Kong bound) of the HZMB Zhuhai Port is very busy now. Members of the public who plan to drive their private cars back to Hong Kong via HZMB are advised to plan ahead their journeys, reserve sufficient commuting time, and be patient while queuing. The public can check the real time situation of the vehicle clearance plaza of HZMB Zhuhai Port through the WeChat official accounts "hzmbzhport" or "zhuhaifabu" (or visit https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/)(Chineseonly) before starting their journeys.
2026-05-25T16:16:00.CONTENT_CN: 港珠澳大橋珠海口岸(往香港方向)的車輛通關廣場現時非常繁忙，計劃駕駛私家車經大橋返港的市民請妥善規劃行程，預留充裕交通時間，同時在輪候時保持忍讓。市民可於開始行程前透過「港珠澳大橋珠海口岸」或「珠海發布」微信公眾號內的「大橋口岸實時通關」服務(或前往https://traffic-info.gzazhka.com:5015/#/)，查詢大橋珠海口岸的車輛實時通關情況。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整

2026-05-25T20:30:00.CONTENT_EN: The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 26 May 2026: Park Island Transport Company Limited 'Ma Wan - Central' Route: - Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) - Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) 'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route: - Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled - Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled
2026-05-25T20:30:00.CONTENT_CN: 以下渡輪服務於2026年5⽉26⽇作出臨時調整： 珀麗灣客運有限公司 「⾺灣-中環」航線： -⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 -中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 「⾺灣-荃灣」航線： -⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次 -荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次

2026-05-26T20:25:00.CONTENT_EN: The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 27 May 2026: Park Island Transport Company Limited 'Ma Wan - Central' Route: - Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p. m. and 7:30 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) - Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p. m. and 8:00 p. m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) 'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route: - Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a. m. is cancelled - Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a. m. is cancelled
2026-05-26T20:25:00.CONTENT_CN: 以下渡輪服務於2026年5⽉27⽇作出臨時調整： 珀麗灣客運有限公司 「⾺灣-中環」航線： -⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 -中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 「⾺灣-荃灣」航線： -⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次 -荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次
